---
title: "Projects"
description-meta: "Research projects by Matías Deneken."
page-navigation: true
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="wide-page-shell">
  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="en">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Projects</h1>
  </header>

  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Proyectos</h1>
  </header>

  <section class="page-wrap">
    <div class="page-content-wide">
      <p class="coming-soon-simple" data-lang="en">Coming soon</p>
      <p class="coming-soon-simple" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">Próximamente</p>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<style>
.wide-page-shell {
  max-width: 1400px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 2rem 3rem;
}

.page-content-wide {
  min-height: 300px;
  padding: 2rem 0;
}

.coming-soon-simple {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--ink-muted, #52526a);
  margin: 0;
  font-style: italic;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .wide-page-shell {
    padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
  }

  .coming-soon-simple {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
  }
}
</style>
```
